title: CodexInstallationIdentity
description: Schemas covering the on-disk UUID file, the credentials carrier, and the outgoing request body slice that carries the installation id.

OnDiskFile.description: Filesystem representation of the installation id.

contents.description: Single v4 UUID string (36 chars), no trailing newline required.

CredentialsCarrier.description: In-memory credentials object passed from codex-auth to createCodex on every getModel call.

installationId.description: Per-install UUID. MUST be present after this spec lands.

ClientMetadataSlice.description: The slice of body.client_metadata that this spec controls. Other keys (e.g. x-codex-window-id) are owned by sibling specs and unaffected.

x-codex-installation-id.description: MUST equal OnDiskFile.contents for the active opencode process.
